_status: machine-drafted, model-reviewed 2026-07-10 (gpt-5.6-sol), Aaron pre-authorized — attorney line-item review pending

founder_majority_preserved: founder designees control more than half
the founder bloc remains the board majority

counter_families.expected_redline_text: The Board will consist of five directors: three Founder Designees, one Series A Designee, and one independent director approved by the Founder Designees and the Requisite Holders.

acceptable.text: The five-member Board has three Founder Designees, preserving the founder majority, plus one Series A seat and one independent approved by the Founder Designees and Requisite Holders; meeting notice remains 30 days.

unacceptable.text: The five-member Board has two Founder Designees and no founder majority, plus one Series A seat; meeting notice remains 30 days.

sensitivity_limits_apply: privilege and trade secrets remain protected
access remains subject to confidentiality limits

counter_families.expected_redline_text: Major Investors receive quarterly unaudited financial statements, annual audited financial statements, and reasonable inspection access during business hours subject to confidentiality, privilege, trade-secret, and competitive-sensitivity limits.

acceptable.text: Major Investors receive statements every three months, with inspection subject to privilege, trade-secret, and sensitivity limits; requests use 10 days' notice and audits use 30 days' notice.

unacceptable.text: Major Investors receive monthly statements and unrestricted inspection without privilege, trade-secret, or sensitivity limits; requests use 10 days' notice and audits use 30 days' notice.

benign_change_templates.text: The parties confirm that Delaware law governs this agreement.
The parties confirm that covered disputes will proceed through confidential arbitration.

novel_deviation_templates.text: Investor consent is required for every budget, hire, vendor contract, and ordinary-course product decision.
